name: Bell Pepper Rajas
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and cut the peppers into 6 strips each.
2. Arrange the pepper strips in an ungreased broilerproof pie pan (9 x 11/4 inches) or round pan (9 x 2 inches).
3. Sprinkle with cheese, olives, and red pepper flakes.
4. Set oven control to broil.
5. Broil peppers with tops 3 to 4 inches from heat until the cheese is melted, about 3 minutes.
